_comment: Intentionally non-conforming fixture. It must be rejected because approval_gates.live_runtime is present but is not an object (here null). A null, string, list, or boolean gate entry cannot carry owner_approval_required or separate_controls_required, so a non-object live/runtime gate must fail rather than be silently accepted. Every other field is well-formed so the checker fails for the live_runtime reason alone.

conformance_claim.statement: claims to conform to Lithos 1.x while supplying a non-object live/runtime gate

controller.assigned_to: the maintainer or an orchestrating agent under maintainer instruction

implementation_agent.assigned_to: a contributing engineer or an AI agent

reviewer.assigned_to: a contributor not involved in the implementation

verifier.assigned_to: the continuous integration system and the reviewer

knowledge_governance.evidence_retention: dev logs and run records retained under docs/dev_log/
knowledge_governance.stale_knowledge_handling: use-driven validation; frozen records are immutable
